name: King Gold and Pawn
description_short: King Gold and Pawn operates 7 NYC pawn shop locations offering collateral-based cash loans against jewelry, watches, diamonds, and collectibles with no credit checks.
description_long:
King Gold and Pawn is a pawn shop network with 7 locations across New York City that specializes in buying, selling, and lending against precious metals and jewelry. The company has been operating in the NYC market with staff members claiming over a decade of experience in item appraisal and valuation. Their primary business model centers on three core functions: pawning items (where customers retain ownership while receiving cash), selling items outright, and providing free appraisals on valuable goods.

The company offers cash loans ranging from $1 to $50,000 against items including gold jewelry, fine watches, sterling silver, diamonds, antique jewelry, coins, and collectibles. They advertise low interest rates and claim an easy repayment policy. Their lending process explicitly requires no credit checks and involves minimal paperwork. Customers can visit any of their 7 physical locations for in-person transactions or request free appraisals remotely via their website contact form.

King Gold and Pawn distinguishes itself through multi-location convenience across NYC, emphasis on competitive pricing ("top dollar"), advertised low interest rates, and experienced staff. They position themselves as a rapid cash solution for customers with valuable items but no access to traditional credit. Their online presence includes live precious metals pricing (gold, silver, platinum) displayed on their website, suggesting daily market-based valuations.

The company operates within the regulated pawn shop industry but lacks transparent disclosure of specific interest rates, loan terms, redemption periods, or item storage policies on their website. While convenient for immediate cash access without credit evaluation, customers should verify actual rates and terms before engaging, as the site provides only marketing claims rather than specific lending disclosures.
pros: 7 convenient physical locations across New York City for walk-in appraisals and transactions
No credit checks required for loans, making access available to customers with poor or no credit history
Loans range from $1 to $50,000, providing flexibility for different cash needs
Free appraisals on jewelry, watches, diamonds, and collectibles with no obligation to pawn or sell
Advertises low interest rates compared to traditional payday lending or credit cards
Staff claim over a decade of experience in appraising multiple item categories
Straightforward pawn process where customers retain ownership of items while receiving immediate cash
cons: Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APR, loan terms, or redemption periods despite advertising 'low interest'
No transparent information about loan repayment policies, fees, or consequences of non-redemption
Lacks details on how items are valued, stored, or insured while in pawn, creating uncertainty about asset protection
Limited online loan application process; primarily requires in-person visits to physical locations
No independent reviews, ratings, or third-party verification of customer satisfaction visible on their website
best_for: Individuals with valuable jewelry, watches, or collectibles who need immediate cash without credit evaluation
NYC residents within proximity to one of their 7 locations seeking quick appraisals or collateral-based loans
People with poor or no credit history who are ineligible for traditional personal loans or credit products
Customers seeking short-term loans who prefer retaining ownership of their items rather than selling outright
diagnosis: King Gold and Pawn is best for NYC residents with valuable items who need immediate cash without credit evaluation and can visit one of their 7 physical locations. The primary caveat is that specific interest rates, loan terms, and redemption policies are not disclosed online, requiring in-person discussion with staff before committing to a loan.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry with customers retaining ownership
Cash loans on gold and precious metals
Cash loans on fine watches and timepieces
Cash loans on diamonds and gemstones
Outright purchase and sale of gold jewelry
Sterling silver jewelry buying and pawning
Silver and gold coins buying and pawning
Estate and antique jewelry appraisal and purchase
Free appraisals on multiple item categories
